name: The Gap, Inc.
description: The Gap, Inc., doing business as Gap Inc., is an American worldwide clothing and accessories retailer. Founded in 1969 by Donald Fisher and Doris F. Fisher and headquartered in San Francisco, California, the company operates four primary brands: its namesake Gap banner, Banana Republic, Old Navy, and Athleta. Gap Inc. is the largest specialty retailer in the United States, offering apparel, accessories, and personal care products for men, women, and children through company-operated stores, franchise stores, and e-commerce sites.
